title: No public sensitive resource
description: A resource tagged sensitive, private, internal, regulated, or production-only must not become publicly reachable after an infrastructure change.

property.natural_language: Resources marked sensitive or private must not be reachable from the public internet.
property.formal_hint: Reachable(public, resource, edges_after) and Sensitive(resource) implies violation

risk.rationale: Infrastructure changes can expose sensitive resources through composed configuration paths.
